customer_message: Our data center connection is down and production workloads are impacted. We need urgent support.
I was charged twice this month and I need help understanding my invoice.
Our team cannot log in to the customer support portal. Password reset is not working.
The device is overheating and randomly shutting down during usage.
Latency has increased significantly between our sites and users are reporting slow application performance.
I need to update the billing contact and account administrator for our company.
We noticed unusual login attempts and need help reviewing access activity.
I want to know the status of my existing support ticket.
